title: Dungeons Bamboo
description: Adds the 3 types of bamboo found in Minecraft Dungeons depending on the 3 biomes it generates in.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

In Minecraft Dungeons, bamboo stalks can be seen in three variants. This resource pack brings those variants into the game, with each one tied to a different jungle-related biome. Bamboo Jungles will look mostly unchanged with a slightly different texture, while regular Jungles have golden bamboo, and Sparse Jungles use an green and brown bamboo texture.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e4fd05f5b3fdd765e741ed6ef9829419723bb98_0.webp)

![(Minecraft Dungeons) In-Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0400951ae2a60e56d158b713bd0a6b9bb80c4fa1.png)
![(Minecraft Dungeons) In-Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a9997b970b63ca36585626d5a3e94efb45dbd38.png)

![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/032b3169badbdce870ae6ae179be88f8150e0e9a_0.webp)

[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
